Class SeparatorInternalsDatabase.VendorCurveRecord

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment.SeparatorInternalsDatabase.VendorCurveRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
SeparatorInternalsDatabase
public static class SeparatorInternalsDatabase.VendorCurveRecord extends Object implements Serializable
Data record for a vendor-certified grade efficiency curve from factory acceptance testing (FAT).

Each record contains measured efficiency points at specific droplet diameters, obtained from standardised testing (EN 13544, ISO 29042, or vendor in-house methods). This provides the "vendor-certified internals curves" capability comparable to commercial tools like MySep.

The diameter and efficiency arrays are stored as semicolon-separated values in the CSV and parsed into arrays on load. A GradeEfficiencyCurve with linear interpolation between measured points is created via toGradeEfficiencyCurve().

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim team
See Also:

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    certificateRef
    Certificate or report reference number.
    String
    curveId
    Unique curve identifier (e.g., "VC001").
    double[]
    diameterPoints_um
    Measured droplet diameters [um].
    double[]
    efficiencyPoints
    Measured efficiencies [0-1] corresponding to diameterPoints_um.
    String
    internalsType
    Internals type (WIRE_MESH, VANE_PACK, AXIAL_CYCLONE, PLATE_PACK).
    double
    maxKFactor
    Maximum K-factor at test conditions [m/s].
    String
    notes
    Additional notes.
    String
    productFamily
    Product family or model designation.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
     
    String
    testDate
    Date of factory acceptance test.
    String
    testFluid
    Test fluid (e.g., "Air-Water", "N2-Exxsol").
    double
    testPressure_bar
    Test pressure [bar].
    String
    testStandard
    Test standard used (e.g., "EN 13544 / ISO 29042").
    double
    testTemperature_C
    Test temperature [degC].
    String
    vendorName
    Vendor name.
